gt_sql: SELECT T1.DisplayName, T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
pred_sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName, u.Reputation 
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(p.Title) = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
question: Which user made a post titled 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?' and how much is the reputation of the user?
